name: FRESH IDEA MANAGEMENT @ MOUNT MARTY UNIVERSITY-DINING HALL

violations.description: Duties of person in charge. — --Person in charge did not ensure employee compliance with an aspect of the food service operation specified in the food service code. Person in charged did not ensure employees properly handled food items on display that were going to be reused. Salsa, shredded cheese, and waffle mix were found on display for self service, but were not maintained at 41F or below. Person in charge must assure employees do not reuse items that are not held at the proper temperature and utilize proper methods for maintaining temperatures for foods that are to be reused.

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Muffins, granola, chocolate chips, sprinkles, peanut butter and waffle mix were found without the protection of a sneeze guard, cover or other means of protection. Food items available for self service should be protected from consumer contamination.
Clean, employee dressing area, cleaning equipment storage, living/sleeping quarters separate (1 pt deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Food display protection, condiment protection, clean tableware usage, sign posted (1 pt deducted)
Method, temperature and time (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
